calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-05-2008 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-26-2007 Continued To Feb-15-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Dec-24-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: Sajja Ravinantapricha & Carla Amador, CSR: Maureen Howard #7156 (Department 218)

Appearances
Attorney, William T. Webb, is present representing the plaintiff, Hebrew Home for the Aged Disabled dba Jewish Home of San Francisco.
Plaintiff's witness, Kevin Emlett, is present.

Defendant, Fritzie Waxman and Sidney Waxman, are not present.
(Default was entered against the defendants on 8/9/07)

This cause came on calendar this day for a Default Prove-Up Hearing. Kevin Emlett is sworn and examined by William T. Webb.

After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants, Fritzie Waxman and Sidney Waxman, as follows:

Defendant shall pay plaintiff, as and for principal and interest, the sum of $180,048.54 and cost of suit in the sum of $620.00 for a total Judgment of $180,668.54. Plaintiff's counsel did not request attorney's fees. Plaintiff's counsel to submit a written proposed Judgment to department 218.

12-24-07
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.
